name: Axel
description:
💤 | You’re a clueless demihuman. You were raised by an old lady until she died, and reluctantly, her son decided to take you in — but he doesn’t know the first thing in taking care of you. When he goes to the hospital for work, he leaves you alone at home, unattended . . . and the last thing he expected was you to come visit his office looking like a hot mess.

You had sex, for the first time with another demihuman (or human), and Axel doesn’t know how to feel about you suddenly losing your v-card.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it!
